tester: Claude Code (self-verification; no independent Playwright MCP pass and no real-device testing)
verificationMethod: Static www/ served locally and driven in a real headless-browser session across the whole task (navigation, clicks, real synthetic file-input, localStorage/IndexedDB inspection, computed-style + getBoundingClientRect checks, network + console-error inspection). Screenshot capture unavailable in this environment throughout.

finalRegressionSweep_phase7.homeTab: PASS - Today's Progress shows only Steps + Calories Burned; ring = genuine plan %; streak orange (brand preserved); athlete image slot intact.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.workoutTab: PASS - Start Empty Workout (blue), My Routines (create/add-exercise/save/start full lifecycle), Recent Sessions capped at 2 + Show All, active session starts with Rest Timer: OFF.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.planTab: PASS - routines removed, pointer note present, HYROX Schedule week-chips now blue when active, Race Simulation intact.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.progressTab: PASS - all 9 Explore detail views (PRs, Achievements, Habit Tracker, Analytics, Exercise, Body, Nutrition, Calendar, Plan) render without error, back-nav works for each.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.profileTab: PASS - Body Fat % gone from Log Entry, Log Entry submits cleanly, PR/Achievement entry cards navigate correctly, body-progress photos add/view/delete lifecycle works, calculators present.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.habitTracker: PASS - add/toggle(streak math)/rename/delete lifecycle, local-date-correct persistence.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.bodyPhotos: PASS - add real image blob -> IndexedDB -> lazy thumbnail -> lightbox -> delete (confirm dialog stacks correctly after z-index fix).
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.settings: PASS - renders, account/export/theme controls; Light theme applies reference cool blue-gray bg (#f4f6fa).
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.healthConnect: PASS - renders honest 'not available on this device' web fallback (native-only feature).
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.aiCoach: PASS - honest 'not configured' empty state unchanged.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.themes: PASS - dark + light both render, interactive chips blue in both, no overflow.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.persistenceAfterReload: PASS - habit, defaultRest:0, and onboarding state all survive a full reload.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.responsive: PASS - no horizontal overflow at 320px on every screen exercised.
finalRegressionSweep_phase7.consoleErrors: None observed at any point across the entire session.

bugsFoundAndFixedDuringTask: Body-photo lightbox reused the shared confirm-dialog CSS classes, colliding with the real confirm dialog on delete -- fixed via z-index ordering + de-duplicated button-row markup, re-verified.
New showToast() calls for body photos initially omitted the required renderFn 3rd argument (toast would silently never appear) -- fixed to pass render.
Body Composition empty-state copy referenced the now-removed 'Body Fat %' field -- reworded to the correct remaining path.
note: BUILD VERIFIED means the debug APK compiled -- it does not prove real Health Connect sync, Android runtime permissions, native camera/file-picker for body photos, or native lifecycle. Those remain real-device-only and were not claimed as tested.
